underlying_goal: Diagnose and fix two issues in the pi coding assistant configuration: context growing too fast (especially for frontend tasks) and the model sometimes going off-track despite having a plan.
friction_detail: Assistant proposed removing full memory injection, but user corrected that they only wanted diaries reduced, not memory.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix fast-growing context and model wandering in pi assistant; assistant diagnosed the issue (excessive diary content injection) and made targeted edits, though needed a correction to preserve full memory injection.
